
---
title: "Methods & Interpretation"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Learning Goals

1. Know the names of the major methods used to study language in the brain
1. Understand the difference between spatial and temporal resolution
1. Identify one thing that brain data can tell us, and one thing it can't
1. Use basic neuroanatomy terms to "navigate" the brain

:::

<!-- lobes; anterior, posterior, inferior, superior, medial, ventral -->

### [<span class="exam-badge">Week 2 Slides ↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1-DlaIOIvnQBYJNo8rJH51RvTGDmv6JFJAnk2MSbpzUQ/edit?slide=id.p#slide=id.p)
